name: Lime Fluff Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the applesauce in a saucepan.
2. Stir in the gelatin until well dissolved.
3. Add the sugar, lime juice, and rind; mix well.
4. Whip the chilled milk until fluffy and thick.
5. Gently fold the applesauce mixture into the whipped milk.
6. Pour the batter into prepared pie crusts.
7. Chill for at least 2 hours before serving.
This recipe makes two pies that freeze well. It always receives compliments when served.
